item.title: software architecture
item.description: Xin chào m.n 👋 💬 Ask me about: https://fb.com/biccv [ Design Large System ] 1 - Review Usecase 2 - Design Interface 3 - Design Business 4 - Design Database [ Software Architecture ] 1 - Performance 2 - Scalability 3 - Reliability 4 - Security 5 - Development 6 - Technology Stack [ Performance ] 1 -
